description: You can use the services in the WebSocket folder to allow clients to send messages, close, and disconnect the WebSocket session.

elements.name: pub.websocket:close
description: WmPublic. Closes the WebSocket connection.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
description: Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

output_parameters.name: closed
description: - true indicates that the WebSocket session was closed successfully.
- false indicates that the WebSocket session was not closed successfully.

elements.name: pub.websocket:disconnect
description: WmPublic. Closes the WebSocket connection abruptly.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
description: Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

output_parameters.name: disconnected
description: - true indicates that the WebSocket session was disconnected successfully.
- false indicates that the WebSocket session was not disconnected successfully.

elements.name: pub.websocket:getCookies
description: WmPublic: Retrieves the cookies that are part of the HTTP request to establish a WebSocket connection.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
description: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve the cookies information.

output_parameters.name: cookies
description: Conditional. List of the cookies that are part of the HTTP request to establish a WebSocket connection. This parameter returns value only if cookies were part of the request.

children.name: name
description: The name of the cookie.

children.name: comment
description: Description about the purpose of the cookie. This parameter returns null if the cookie has no comment.

children.name: commentURL
description: The comment URL which describes the purpose of the cookie. This parameter returns null if the cookie has no comment.

children.name: discard
description: The value of the discard attribute for the cookie.

children.name: domain
description: The domain name set for the given cookies.

children.name: maxAge
description: The maximum age of the cookie specified in seconds.

children.name: path
description: The path on the server to which the browser returns the cookie.

children.name: portlist
description: The value of the port list attribute of the cookie.

children.name: secure
description: - True Sending the cookie is restricted to a secure protocol.
- False The cookie can be sent using any protocol.

children.name: value
description: The value of the cookie.

children.name: version
description: The version of the protocol with which the cookie complies.

elements.name: pub.websocket:getExtensions
description: WmPublic: Retrieves the extensions used in the request URL to establish a WebSocket connection.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
description: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve the extension information.

output_parameters.name: extensions
description: Conditional. The list of extensions for a WebSocket connection.

children.name: name
description: The name of the header.

children.name: parameterizedName
description: The parameterized name of the extension.

children.name: parameterKeys
description: The parameterized keys of the extension.

children.name: parameters
description: The list of parameters for the given extension.

elements.name: pub.websocket:getHeaders
description: WmPublic: Retrieves the headers used in the request URL to establish a WebSocket connection.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
description: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve the header information.

output_parameters.name: headers
description: Conditional. The list of the headers included in with the request to establish a WebSocket connection. This parameter returns a value only if headers were part of the request.

children.name: name
description: The name of the header.

children.name: value
description: The value of the header.

elements.name: pub.websocket:getPathParameters
description: WmPublic: Retrieves the path parameters used in the request URL to establish a WebSocket connection.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
description: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve the path parameters information.

output_parameters.name: queryParameters
description: Conditional. The path parameters included in with the request for establishing a WebSocket connection.

children.name: name
description: The name of the path parameter.

children.name: value
description: The value of the path parameter.

elements.name: pub.websocket:getPathParameter
description: WmPublic: Retrieves the path parameter used in the request URL to establish a WebSocket connection.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
description: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve the path parameter information.

input_parameters.name: pathParameterName
description: The path parameter name of the query parameter for which you want to obtain a value.

output_parameters.name: pathParameterValue
description: Conditional. The value for the provided parameter name. This parameter is returned only if a path parameter of the specified value was part of the request.

elements.name: pub.websocket:getRequest
description: WmPublic: Retrieves the HTTP request information used to establish the WebSocket connection.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
description: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve HTTP request information.

output_parameters.name: requestURI
description: The Uniform Resource Identifier used by the client to identify the request.

output_parameters.name: queryString
description: One or more name/value pairs included as part of the query strings in request uniform resource locator(URL) which assigns values to specified parameters. For example, ?name=ferret&color=purple.

output_parameters.name: host
description: Name or IP address of the WebSocket server that received the upgrade request.

output_parameters.name: httpVersion
description: The HTTP version used in the request.

output_parameters.name: method
description: The HTTP method used for establishing WebSocket connection.

output_parameters.name: origin
description: The value of the origin request header.

output_parameters.name: userPrincipal
description: The name of the authenticated user used in the request.

elements.name: pub.websocket:getQueryParameters
description: WmPublic: Retrieves the query parameters used in the request URL to establish a WebSocket connection.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
description: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to obtain query parameters.

output_parameters.name: queryParameters
description: Conditional. The list of query parameters used on the URL that established a WebSocket connection.

children.name: name
description: The name of the query parameter.

children.name: value
description: The value of the query parameter.

elements.name: pub.websocket:getQueryParameter
description: WmPublic: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve the value of a specific query parameter information.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
description: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to obtain query parameters.

input_parameters.name: queryParameterName
description: The name of the query parameter for which you want to obtain a value.

output_parameters.name: queryParameterValue
description: Conditional. The value for the provided parameter name. The parameter is only returned if there is a query parameter of that name in the URL.

elements.name: pub.websocket:getSubProtocols
description: WmPublic: Retrieves the subprotocols used in the request URL to establish a WebSocket connection.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
description: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve the subprotocols of the connection.

output_parameters.name: subProtocols
description: The WebSocket protocols used as part of establishing a WebSocket connection.

elements.name: pub.websocket:onBinary
description: WmPublic. Specification for a callback service related to WebSocket server or client endpoint that handles binary payload.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
description: Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

input_parameters.name: payload
description: Byte array that contains the payload.

input_parameters.name: offset
description: The offset from the byte array till which the data is to be read.

input_parameters.name: length
description: The maximum number of byte array to read from the payload.

elements.name: pub.websocket:onClose
description: WmPublic. Specification for a callback service related to WebSocket server or client endpoint that gets invoked when a WebSocket session is closed or disconnected.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
description: Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

input_parameters.name: statusCode
description: The pre-defined status codes when closing an established connection are defined in Section https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6455#section-7.4.

input_parameters.name: reason
description: Text explaining the reason for closure.

elements.name: pub.websocket:onConnect
description: WmPublic. Specification for a callback service related to WebSocket server or client endpoint that gets invoked when a WebSocket session is successfully established.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
description: Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

elements.name: pub.websocket:onError
description: WmPublic. Specification for a callback service related to WebSocket server or client endpoint that gets invoked when an error is encountered resulting in WebSocket session termination.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
description: Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

input_parameters.name: cause
description: Text explaining the cause of the error.

elements.name: pub.websocket:onText
description: WmPublic. Specification for a callback service related to WebSocket server or client endpoint that handles text payload.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
description: Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

input_parameters.name: message
description: The content of the message.

elements.name: pub.websocket:ping
description: WmPublic: Sends a ping message containing the given application data to the remote endpoint after establishing the connection.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
description: Required. Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to send the ping message.

input_parameters.name: applicationData
description: Optional. The application data to be sent as part of the ping message. If the parameter value is null an empty buffer will be sent.

input_parameters.name: charset
description: Optional. The character encoding. If the parameter value is null, the default character set is used.

output_parameters.name: pinged
description: Indicates the success or failure of the ping message. This parameter returns a value of true if the ping message is received successfully. Else the parameter returns the value false.

elements.name: pub.websocket:pong
description: WmPublic: Sends back an unsolicited pong message with the exact application data as the ping for the WebSocket session.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
description: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to send the pong message.

input_parameters.name: applicationData
description: Optional. The application data to be sent as part of the pong message. If the parameter value is null an empty buffer will be sent.

input_parameters.name: charset
description: Optional. The character encoding. If the parameter value is null, the default character set is used.

output_parameters.name: ponged
description: Conditional. Indicates the success or failure of the pong message. This parameter returns a value of true if the pong message is received successfully. Else the parameter returns the value of false.

elements.name: pub.websocket:send
description: WmPublic. Sends a message on a connected WebSocket session.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
description: Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

input_parameters.name: message
description: Sends messages containing the payload to the destination. The message could be a byte array or a text message.

output_parameters.name: sent
description: - true indicates that the WebSocket session was sent successfully.
- false indicates that the WebSocket session was not sent successfully.
